mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS ( customer_id, branch_id, kiosk_id, order_type, language, status, created_at, waiting_no, receipt_no, total_price, coupon_used ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{branchId}, #{kioskId}, #{orderType}, #{language}, '결제대기', NOW(), NULL, CONCAT('REC-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), '-', LPAD(FLOOR(RAND()*1000), 3, '0')), #{totalPrice}, FALSE )
